summary.description:
Today, cooler for the feels like temperature (down 3.9°C) and outside temperature (down 3.3°C) and more moisture-laden outside humidity (up 7%).

Compared to today, yesterday also had noticeable differences in cloud levels (up 694 m).

The past week and month had observable variation in dew point temperature (up 3.8°C), outside temperature (up 4.9°C), cloud levels (up 523 m), and inside temperature (up 2.8°C) when compared to today.

cloud levels.description:
Today’s average cloud levels is 693.7m lower than yesterday, 523.2m lower than the past week, 345.1m lower than the past month.

Yesterday, the cloud levels ranged from a minimum of 1140m to a maximum of 3940m, averaging 1823.5m; the past week and month had slightly higher averages of 2350m and 2170m respectively.
cloud levels.summary: The clouds will be high, plenty of sunshine is expected.

summary.summary: Inside; a mild and comfortable temperature is anticipated. Outside; icy, freezing temperatures. Also, the atmosphere will feel parched and dry and slight breezes. Chance of light rain, the clouds will be high, plenty of sunshine is expected, and it’s dark. Similar weather conditions should remain.

washing.phrase: It is nighttime; if you have washing out then bring it in as it will probably get damper overnight.
